text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: adamw

Log:
  Fix potion mixing.

  From PR:
  	This routine is swapping the potion colors and because only 2/3
  	of the color swap code is there, many of the potions end up with
  	the same color.

  PORTREVISION bump.

  PR:		209310
  Submitted by:	sjrbulk at verizon dot net
